title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Marines, Robin, Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #15 as robin and Usopp encounter the Tontatta people while Law’s meeting with Doflamingo and Fujitora becomes increasingly dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We can't have the exchange here! Call it off!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: If the Marines are involved, it'll be bad for us too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Especially since I have teamed up with the strawberries now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: There's still 15 minutes... I need your 'sniping' and 'recon' abi- lities...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I need you guys to watch my back...there could be people waiting in Ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Hey! You're not planning on double- crossing us are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: If there are any abnormalities in the forest, notify me at once.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Wait a second ...we never factored the Marines into our plan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Time remaining until the Exchange: 14 mins Green Bit Forest

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: R-Robin! This forest is way too dangerous!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: WAIT! Don't go off with- out me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fufu ...you're sounding as reliable as ever, USOPP?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm begging you, please keep your voice down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Who goes there! Are you one of the straw- hats?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Where are you...?! show your- self!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines!! But...who are they talking to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It appears as though they already knew about our coming to this island.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We're Marines! We protect civilians! We're the good guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Then please, give us your weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We can't give your our weapons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We still have a mission to carry out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: What is wrong with this forest!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
